code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut line_start = 0
mut found = false
mut last_start = 0
mut last_end = 0

while i <= n
  mut is_end = false
  if i == n
    is_end = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 10
        is_end = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  if is_end
    let line = string.substring(input, line_start, i)
    if not string.is_empty(string.trim(line))
      last_start = line_start
      last_end = i
      found = true
    end
    line_start = i + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found
  println(string.substring(input, last_start, last_end))
else
  println("(none)")
end
